authored.summary: Synthesized from 8 domain maps + data/UI/workflow crosswalks against verified local repo state (curaos/backend/services, tools/codegen, packages). CuraOS owns a strong generator-first substrate (codegen mold with .tsp.hbs + .asyncapi.yaml.hbs, sdk-emit, live-emit, ui-app-emit, service-seed-emit) and ~25 real-working services. The gaps cluster in: (1) the FHIR-R4 clinical resource set (10+ scaffold-only healthstack services with NO src), (2) the revenue cycle (X12 837/835/270/271 + paper forms + fee schedule, no x12-sdk package exists), (3) cross-cutting UI archetypes missing from ui-kit (Kanban, Calendar, Wizard, Entity360, ApprovalInbox, Ledger, etc.), (4) data-truth violations (healthstack-billing repository is in-memory Map, several FKs in-memory), (5) generator capability gaps (single CRUD screen archetype, no dual person/management surface emission, no AI/MCP/connector-registry primitives). Generator-first is mandatory: every new-entity gap lands as .tsp contract -> @curaos/*-sdk regen -> emitServiceLive scaffold -> emitUiApp wiring, with reusable primitives folded into tools/codegen, never per-service hand-edits. Person-centric lens dominant: every gap yields a person surface + management surface on shared contract, no source business/management/compliance feature dropped.

cross_cutting_notes: Generator-first landing order is binding (curaos-generator-evolution-rule): feature -> codegen template/emitter (tools/codegen) -> @curaos/contracts (.tsp + AsyncAPI) -> @curaos/<name>-sdk -> service controller/drizzle -> FE via ui-app-emit. NEW domain models go in the SERVICE specs/<name>.tsp, NOT the mold (mold ships only health/protected/protected-write/whoami probes). Reusable cross-service behavior goes in tools/codegen/templates/service-core/specs/ and codegen emitters.

Sequencing: (1) fix data-truth in-memory stores FIRST (blocks billing/claims/sales live use); (2) build party-core REAL (upstream identity anchor everything FKs); (3) clinical FHIR resource set + terminology binding; (4) revenue cycle (@curaos/x12 + fee-schedule + coverage); (5) accounting-core GL/tax/currency; (6) ui-kit archetypes + generator dual-surface (unblocks every person surface); (7) workflow/automation primitives + connector registry; (8) domain verticals (insurance, maternity, CDS).

Reuse-over-parallel (curaos-reuse-dry-rule): Referral=ServiceRequest+Task; Carrier=Organization+InsurancePlan; Activity=Task+calendar (polymorphic parent, not parallel types); CarePlan.activity+Referral reference ONE tasks-core Task; expense/depreciation post to accounting-core (single GL owner, no duplicate ledger); medical-supply dispense reuses inventory issueStock; drug-as-product reuses commerce product + inventory SKU; one documents-core plane for clinical+CRM+ERP; one cadence primitive (donation recurrence) for donation+subscription+contract+recurring-invoice.

Person-centric lens applied to every gap: each yields a person surface (patient-app/personal-*/customer portal: journey-driven, simple) + a management surface (clinician/admin/business: full compliance+control) on shared contract+SDK; no source business/management/compliance feature dropped, only re-sequenced/defaulted/automated.
